name: Omar Al-Qaisi
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم يا عمر 👋 لاحظنا أنك حصلت على 27/100 في الاختبار الأخير، وأنا هنا لأساعدك تحسن درجاتك قبل الاختبار القادم بـ 6 أيام 💪 هل تقدر نلتقي غدًا عشان نشتغل على النقاط الضعيفة معك؟
action: Call Omar today to introduce yourself, assess specific learning gaps from the failed quiz, and schedule a one-on-one tutoring session within the next 48 hours.
reasoning: Omar has never been contacted despite critical quiz failure and is on a remedial track, representing highest intervention risk. With 6 days until the next quiz and 100% attendance showing commitment, immediate intensive support could prevent further academic decline.
